###  (CMU) "A Primal-Dual Algorithmic Framework for Non-smooth Convex Minimization Subject to a Conic Constraints."

Fri, 9 Jan 2017, 5-6pm, room 537 Salk, 401 Salk St, Parkeson

http://salk.edu/events/details/a-primal-dual-algorithmic-framework-for-nonsmooth-convex-minimization-subject-to-a-conic-constraints/

Many optimization problems arising from applications involve a minimization of a convex non-smooth objective function subject to conic constraints. We propose an algorithmic framework for solving such optimization problems that combines a primal-dual based iterative algorithm with a smoothing function for solving a sequence of smoothing sub-problems. The convergence analysis shows that the primal-dual algorithm is optimal with respect to the number of iteration, the computation complexity per iteration and the required assumptions on the problem.

This is joint work with  and.

# GitHub

## GitHub的配置

~~~shell
# 连接远程数据库时不需要邮箱密码
$ git remote add origin https://github.com/Wengyuming/MyTest.git
fatal: remote origin already exists.

# 解决方法：先删除
# 查看远程库信息
$ git remote -v 
origin  https://github.com/Wengyuming/MyTest.git (fetch)
origin  https://github.com/Wengyuming/MyTest.git (push)
$ git remote rm origin 
$ git remote -v 

# 重新设置远程github的登录名和密码
$ git remote add origin https://Wengyuming:@github.com/Wengyuming/MyTest.git
$ git push --set-upstream origin master
~~~

- 通过远程URL克隆项目时，不想使用默认的master作为分支，而是想要自己的master分支，并将其改名为master。

# Bernstein’s Problem and Arens regularity

## 16/03/2014, (11:14)‎

In this talk, we will recall briefly the famous Bernstein's Problem (due to R. Bernstein) which asks whether a continuous function defined on a closed interval is a uniform limit of polynomial functions (which is equivalent to the approximation of a continuous function on an interval by polynomials). We will show how, in order to obtain an algebraic characterization, this problem can be translated to the more general framework of multivariate polynomial approximation of continuous functions defined on compact sets of $$\mathbb{R}^n$$ and give then a solution. Our proof relies on the classical Arens Regular theory and the algebra of multivariate polynomials.

### Category: maths

A mathematical fact, in a way that’s a little like a crossword puzzle.

A polynomial in x and y, such that we know it’s the product of a polynomial in x and a polynomial in y.

An example answer is x2y2+xy3. The trick is deciding which factors are to multiply together, so that’s enough information to determine them.

If you need ideas, here are a couple of problems in the same topic.

### Category: puzzle/brain

When I think of a 3-digit number, my first digit is double my second digit, and my third digit is three times my first digit. What number am I thinking of?

The same question, in another language: si trovo una frase di 3 cifre, la prima è doppio la seconda e la terza è tre volta la prima. Che frase stiamo?

I will be using a json api to get data from the server. For example my API will show movies, so the route to see that will be /api/movie.

The first thing I will do is to create a simple REST API with Express and some dummy data. The second thing I will do is to create a simple client with angular so I can use RESTful API's with angular.

First lets start with creating an API.

I will be using Express, so create a new directory and use

npm init

to initialise your package.

Use npm install express --save to install express.

Create a file called app.js.

```javascript

var app = require('express')();
```

This creates an instance of express and stores it in the variable called app. We will use app later on this script to define routes.

Before we start, I need to install node-restclient.

npm install node-restclient

Now we can add some routes like this

```javascript

app.get('/hello', function(req, res){
  res.send({'hello': 'hello'});

### Binary Tree, DFS (Preorder), DFS (Postorder), DFS (Inorder), Depth-First Search (DFS)
* **Binary Tree**
  * A collection of nodes where each node has a value, a left child node, and a right child node.
* **Depth First Search (DFS)**
  * An algorithm designed to find something in a data structure.
  * DFS traverses a tree or graph. Each vertex/node is visited once.

**Depth First Search (DFS) Algorithms**

These are functions that recursively call themselves until they reach the end of the data structure:

* **DFS (Preorder)**
  * Start at the root. Visit the current node, then go left (recursion), then go right (recursion).
  * The result is an array that contains each element from the lowest level up to the highest level.
* **DFS (Postorder)**
  * Visit the left subtree (left, recursion), then visit the right subtree (right, recursion), then visit the current node.
  * The result is an array that contains each element starting from the bottom, then in order from left to right.
* **DFS (Inorder)**
  * Visit the left subtree (

## Introduction

Here we go. Introduction. We will build up to a 3d model, and will visualize the process with the help of this site. The model is described in this paper.

## The problem

The problem at large is this: Assume you have a set of vertices, and edges. What information is missing? Here is the breakdown. A solid model requires vertex information (x, y, z), edges (connected vertices) and faces (connected edges).

• vertex info - (x, y, z) - is ok to assume
• edges - is given
• faces - not given

The challenge is in determining the faces.

## 3D Surface

This video shows how you can estimate a surface from a scatter plot in gnuplot. The surface must be 3d, the surface will be shown in 3 space, and will be viewed from an angle. This is a 3d model.

## Estimation Procedure

To estimate the faces from a set of vertices and edges, let's start by constructing a 3d model of each face, and then construct a surface model.

We are looking for an algorithm that takes an array and a subarray size. It will be able to compute the summation of the subarray.

![](../images/002.png)

We can assume that there are enough elements in the array to satisfy the subarray condition. Here for example, we have 5 elements and the subarray is 3. So the first, middle and last element can form a subarray satisfying the condition.

![](../images/003.png)

This is a simple linear search algorithm that iterates through the array and for each element, it will call a function to check if the element is the beginning of the subarray. In this example a = 3.

When it finds an element that is the beginning of a subarray, it calls function subSum, with the following as parameter: current array element, the size of the subarray and the current index.

How does Asterisk work?

Asterisk is an open telephony protocol server that is free and open source.

It is made to build custom telephone solutions and can be integrated into systems and applications to manage and control communications. Asterisk provides a virtual PBX that is used as a core gateway to integrate and control communications to and from the IP network.

The Asterisk server is made to handle 12 simultaneous calls and is easy to use.

In a cloud-enabled world, IT departments know for a fact that data is the key to the future and if it is in the cloud now, chances are it will be in the cloud for the next generation.

Asterisk is a tool that can assist companies and institutions in making crucial calls to clients or other institutions and is an ideal solution for contact centers and call centers.

x+3^n = 9^y.

10^x - 3^y = 17.
(A single variable equation.)

3^n + 61^m = 5,
where n and m are integers, and find at least one solution for the equation.

### 16 Aug 2010

It all began about three years ago, when a friend of mine approached to me to try to join the team to maintain a product that was in PHP. He was familiar with the language, but, although it worked, it wasn't an elegant code. The problem was that it was developed in a way he felt wasn't the right way because he was more used to use a language like Java than PHP. I knew about the language, but I didn't like some aspects like the lack of packages (which seemed to me like a mess) and the lack of good programming techniques like the use of exceptions instead of return codes.

So I joined this PHP team. This was the first time that I saw something that looked like Java (I said'something' because, despite the fact that many aspects are very similar, there were some important differences), the first time that I saw the importance of good programming methods and the first time that I saw that it could be nice to use exceptions instead of return codes. One year later, I came to realize how PHP can improve and make it nicer in all aspects. At this point I felt like a new person who has discovered, a new planet

Git is a distributed software management system developed on Unix platforms. It is designed to handle large projects, such as the Linux kernel project. In this project we will practice object oriented programming concepts in Ruby. In this project students will design database schema for a restaurant reservation website called Happy Hour, Inc.

## Objectives

1. Be able to design domain-specific databases.
2. Be able to implement single source of truth by extracting out repeated data into separate tables.
3. Be able to write migrations that create tables and columns in the database and also how to write seed data to the database without duplicating information


## Tasks

1. Create a table called Restaurants that accepts a restaurant name and street address.
2. Add a users table that accepts user email and has_many restaurants
3. Add a dates table that accepts the date for an upcoming reservation with has_many restaurants

Your schema should match the example below - a diagram to show your table relationships. It's possible to have more tables, but these are the three required tables.

## What if you could win a Nokia 3310 every week? Well, we don't make 'em like that, but here's your chance.

First off, just so we're on the same page: The 19% Challenge is an entry-only competition for Nokia 3310, and no purchase or commitment is required to enter or win the prizes. But for anyone not familiar, the rules are simple:

Every week, you write down 5 positive things that you noticed during the week. If you notice more than 19% less than 5 percent you get a free Nokia brick. No purchase or commitment.

That's it. Easy, right? The challenge is to get the percentage to just a little over 19% (like 20.1%), so you can win a Nokia 3310. Just email your entries to.

# Embarrassingly parallel problems

A parallel program is said to exhibit embarassingly parallelism if it can be partitioned across many nodes with little regard to communication or dependencies between the partitioned tasks. If a problem is embarssingly parallel then the most straight-forward parallel approach is to partition the problem across many nodes with little communication. This post contains a number of example that exhibit this behaviour.

## The Monte Carlo Method for Calculating Pi

One of the motivating problems for parallel computing was calculating the value of $pi=3.1415...$ accurately. A method that was introduced, and widely used, was the Monte Carlo method. It is a probabilistic method but it can be proved that, if the method is run to infinity, then the estimated value given can be arbitarily accurate. For more details, see the Wikipedia page.

The method works as follows:

• draw $N$ random points in a square, all with coordinates between $[0,1]x[0,1]$
• count

# [Python技巕]: TensorFlow讀取TFRecord檔

By  | Jun 20, 2018

3 minute read

## 前言

TensorFlow可以將訓練後的結果輸出成pb格式的檔案，若有使用自己訓練完成的模型，想運用到其他語言的開發中，可以考慮使用這種方式。

But...

### Q-learning-QNet
This repo provides implementation in TensorFlow of Q-networks such as RIQNet, RIQNet_Padded, TRIQNet [1,2,3]. The implementation for Q learning is based on the TensorFlow tutorial for basic Q learning. All theorems and proofs are provided in [2,3]. The results are reported in [3].

## Folder Structure
- q-learning.py: The main Q learning implementation. You may change the constants in the CONFIG dictionary or run the script with python q-learning.py args.
- state_encode.py: Encodes a state as a one-hot vector.
- experience_encode.py: Encodes an experience as a list of inputs and outputs for training.
- experience_db.py: Stores and retrieves experiences. This is the core of Q-learning. It is an essential component providing the Markov property.
- nn.py: Creates neural networks to represent Q functions.

## Requirements
- Python3
- TensorFlow 1.1
- Pandas 0.21
- numpy 1.13
- scipy 0.19

The mean is the arithmetic mean of the sample data. Here, the sample means can be used to estimate the population mean.

What does the geometric mean represent?

# Nature of the Emergent Glassy Dynamics after a Quench

Abstract

Glass transitions arise as an extreme consequence of the frustrated interactions inherent of systems consisting of densely packed building blocks. In contrast, supercooled liquids show a smooth transition from a liquid to a glassy state as a function of the cooling rate, suggesting that there is no universality in the emergent glassy dynamics. Here, by using first-principle simulations, we show that the emergent glassy dynamics from a quench into the supercooled liquid state consists of a two-step relaxation. The transition to this two-step relaxation is found to be universal.

# How to find your way with the Linux filesystem 

1. Create a new folder called `hello`
    - mkdir hello

2. Enter the `hello` directory
    - cd hello

3. Create a directory called `world` within the `hello` directory
    - mkdir../hello/world

4. Change directory names from `hello` to `greeting`
    - mv hello greeting

5. Remove the `greeting` directory 
    - rm -v -r -f greeting

6. Remove the `world` directory 
    - rm -v -r -rf world

> Note: Use `man` command to look for help. For example, to search directory deletion, use `man rm `.

## December 20-24, 2021

Location: NASA Ames Research Center, Ames, CA

The Causal Semantics program started under's supervision in 2016 and has grown substantially since then. The program’s primary goal is to develop the causal semantics of natural language: a mathematical theory that accounts for how speakers’ causal claims are structured, how we infer them, and how they are pragmatically processed. It provides a general and quantitative notion of “cause,” and supports an account of both first-person and third-person causal claims that generalizes the standard notion in the philosophy of language and the linguistics of causality. It has three lines of inquiry, each of which uses new techniques with important connections between them. First, a set theoretic representation of causal facts and their inference rules. Secondly, a causal-role-centered approach to causal semantics. Third is a computational theory of causal language understanding. The program seeks to foster the dialogue between these approaches, and also, between the causal

In the above, it explains the steps for an NPN transistor in the common collector circuit. However, how do these steps apply to a Common Emitter circuit? Isn't the current flow from emitter to collector?

This answer discusses the common emitter amplifier's design choices - there is nothing in the design that demands the common collector circuit. Moreover, the common collector circuit doesn't care about the current flow direction - it's determined at the gate level and the analysis doesn't need to be aware of that detail.

### What's new in NLP SE

It is time for the annual update on NLP SE activity.

### NLP Conference

NLP Conference is a forum for discussion among all aspects of natural language processing. As mentioned in a previous post, it is an event organized by the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL) in the USA. The conference is free of charge, but requires a registration fee. The registration fee is \$25 for NLP community members and \$150 if you are representing a Nation state or organization. This year, the conference also offers an all-expenses paid student scholarship attracting 15% of the scholarship from other students, with a limit of 10 students per institution. As indicated in the description of the conference, "this is a forum for discussion among all aspects of natural language processing". A few relevant keywords are listed on the conference webpage, which are "Language Processing", "Machines that Read", "Information Extraction", "Speech and Audio Processing, and "Vision and Visualization".

EMNLP Conference is an yearly joint event held

# The Evil that is Hidden in Simple Data Structure

As a computer scientist/programmer you can't help but think about data structures which can be defined with the following schema:

1. There isn't a limit to the number of fields within a record
2. There is no restriction/bound on the type of contents of a field (any type)
3. There are no rules/restrictions to the names given to a field

## Why this is dangerous

These features make it easy for a coder to create/implement the above types (which are called records in most languages as they are an implementation of a struct). These types are also very common in the real world as the data they represent can be used to describe almost everything, e.g. people, animals, cars, etc. There will most likely be hundreds, perhaps thousands, of fields within these records. It will, of course, be desirable that the individual fields will somehow describe the attributes of objects they represent (like name, age, etc.) as it does make the records more helpful when accessing their contents/fields; there will most likely be many objects of a particular

### Infinite sums of reciprocals of squares

The formula

$\zeta(2) = \displaystyle\sum_{n=1}^\infty \dfrac{1}{n^2} = \dfrac{\pi^2}{6}$

is an amazing fact about the number $\pi$ (pi, pronounced PIE). I wrote a nice explanation of it here on this blog and I wrote a lovely Numberphile video about it. It was recently discovered that the formula can be generalized to include an extra parameter $t \neq 1$ (called a q-series) to get the formula

$\zeta(t) = \displaystyle\sum_{n=1}^\infty \dfrac{1}{n^t} = (1-2^{1-t})\displaystyle\prod_{n=1}^\infty \dfrac{1}{1-2^{-t}q^n}$.

This product formula for $\zeta(t)$ is called the Euler product formula,

git clone :seankaika/angularjs-sample-app-weather.git

```
brew install yarn
```
- Then run yarn install

```
yarn install

- Start the dev environment

```
yarn start

## Important Concepts:

• A 3rd-order (3-rd/3rd) ODE is one in which the highest differential order is 3.
• A 3rd order ODE can also be reduced to 2nd-order by using the technique of repeated integrations.
• 3rd-order ODEs come up in the physics of simple pendulums.
• The third-order ODEs are solved in their canonical forms with the techniques of integrating factors and variation of parameters.
• As we move onto the topic of 4th order ODEs, the techniques of solving the 3rd-order are extended to include linear 4th-order ODEs.

## The General Form of a 3rd order ODE

The general form of a third-order ordinary differential equation is:
$y^{{'''}}+Ay^{{''}}+By^'+Cy=f (x)$
Where A, B, C are a set of constants related to the problem.

Content plays a major role in the overall page rank of your website, and is one of the most important factors in your search engine rankings, as Google has come to know. There are many reasons why content is so vital – including the search terms that people look for. You can also try to target other sub-domains that may be similar to the ones being searched for, or that are often searched for alongside the main keywords.

### On-Site Optimisation

Another aspect of search engine optimisation to try and improve upon is the overall look and feel of your website. To do this, you may use a number of different services and programs, but the following are a few which are best for SEO.

From Nareling La, one can also take the short trek to Saghru Peak to enjoy the spectacular view of the Himalayas.

text:
As I have been discussing the magic of word embeddings (word2vec) with a few of you, I want to share and discuss a few other aspects that come to my mind. This post is a short (long) list of things that I have learned throughout the past couple of years.

In this post, I talk about

• Why are word embeddings important?
• How do we create word embeddings?
• How to measure similarity of two word embeddings?
• Is there any other use of word vectors beyond similarity?

## Why are word embeddings important?

You are working on a NLP problem right now and suddenly you realize that all your features are words (a.k.a text) and that is the only real-valued data you have in your hands. How do you apply machine learning/neural networks on it? How is it different from a problem like, image classification or object detection, where the input are pixels? Or how is it different from a structured data problem (like regression) where input are numbers?

What I want to say here is that, since input is words, we need some way to map them into numbers, otherwise most machine learning methods will freak out.

text:
Building a successful software platform is done by building software.
If that software platform is to be successful then its usage must be high.
To increase this usage the software platform must have some quality attributes.
Quality attributes are requirements that are needed to make a product at least "good enough" to be used.
In this context the term good enough means acceptable by the user without being in some way undesirable or unacceptable.
Here are some important quality attributes for software platforms that can help drive high usage and adoption:

1. __Functionality__
    - Does the software platform accomplish what it needs to?
2. __Security__
    - Does the software platform protect its users against harm and unauthorized access?
3. __Interoperability__
    - Does the software platform work with other software platforms? In what situations can two or more organizations use the software platforms' APIs without the API provider?
4. __Performance__ / __Response Time__
    - How well does the software platform respond to the user's requests and meet deadlines?
5. __Scalability__
    - How well can the software platform be upgraded to meet an increased level of use or requests when it is no longer able to meet requirements,
prompt_prefix: Building a successful software platform is done by building software

Meaningful, reliable and valid mRNA expression measurements of thousands of genes can be simultaneously achieved by using RNAseq technology, which provides the foundation for exploring genetic interactions and other functional interactions and complex traits using RNA sequence.

Here we review the recent progress of RNAseq analysis methods including sample processing and data analysis. We also provide a roadmap for future development of RNAseq methods, including analysis of single cells and RNA profiling with massively parallel sequencing.

## Keypoints

1. RNAseq analysis methods are increasingly being used to explore interactions between genes, cellular pathways and complex traits.
2. The current methods have developed to provide a means for comprehensive genetic analyses of the transcriptome and epigenome.

### Abbreviations

1. RNAseq  RNA-sequencing (also called RNA-Seq or RNA-seq) is a sequencing to examine the structure of an RNA
2. RT-qPCR Reverse-transcription quantitative polymerase chain reaction (also called rt-PCR) is a molecular biology technique to amplify a specific gene
3. CAGE  Cap Analysis of Gene Expression (also called cage, cAGE) is a

text:
Constant development in Unmanned Aircraft System (UAS) industry has pushed the need for advanced software components to evolve. In particular, rapid deployment, on board computations, and system-level integration are of much interest. Therefore, the research community has studied several approaches to address the challenge of system-level integration. In this paper, we survey and classify the integration approaches that are relevant to UAS applications. Our survey identifies three relevant areas related to the integration of multiple software components; i.e. (i) hardware-in-the-loop (HITL); (ii) software-in-the-loop (SITL); and (iii) full system test. In the HITL, the research has mainly focused on the modeling of the hardware and associated software components in simulation and experimentation to enable software evaluation without hardware deployment. In the SITL, the research has focused mostly on simulation, software components, and the communication between the software components. The full system integration has mainly focused on modeling the hardware and the communication between the hardware components. We then provide a more detailed survey of the approaches presented by the main integration approaches for each domain.

Your children are going to love math for no good reason. It’s not a chore that you’ve done to them.

## What is a good school for my kids?

It may come from your parents and they may say ‘it doesn’t matter which school your kids go to … they’ll succeed in school anyway’.

I disagree. Every child and every individual has different strengths. Some need more time to learn, some are able to absorb more than others, one may have a love for math and logic, another hates math.

These are things you should ask your children about and consider as you decide where your kids should go to school.

The fact is, when you send your kids to school, the school system doesn’t know anything about your kids, your child. They don’t know who they’re talking with, what your personality like is etc.

	class PlacesController < ApplicationController

			render json: Place.all

			place = Place.new(place_params)
			if place.save

			else
				render json: place.errors
			end

text:
The High brightness is being compared to 350. If it is higher than 350, brightness is being subtracted from 765. The brightest part of the picture is being shrunk the most. If it's darker, then that point is being subtracted by 765 and it is shrunk the most. For example, if you were subtracting 300 from brightest point 400, that point would be being shrunk the most, at about 70 pixels wide instead of 100.

Then for each lightness value, 100 to 0, I draw a white ellipse that is that number of pixels wide, but the height is being constantly multiplied by 1.5. The white ellipse then gets more narrow as brightness increases. The ellipse also gets smaller as brightness increases.

The height is multiplying by 1.5 so that it is being stretched a little bit in the y direction. The stretching in the y is the most important because I am stretching this ellipse in the y direction

It’s kind of hard to tell from the pictures, so click on the photo to enlage them.  This is an example of the “dichroic cut-through” phenomenon (“dichroic reflectors” will be discussed in a later post).  In short, the camera sees the red LED through its normal lens and the blue LED through a green/blue (or even blue only) filters – this isn’t really an example of dichroic cut-through per se, in that the blue LED is not the light source to be reflected.  But this shows that the DFD actually gives a little more than 3:1 contrast ratio (which is all that it’s supposed to be specified for), as the blue LED is quite a bit brighter than the red LED.  The dichroic reflectivity (at 540 nm) is about 92.5% and 99.6% for the green and red components respectively.  So, about 2/3 of the blue-reflected light, and of that about 4/5 is green-reflected and the rest is red-reflected.

Both the federation of states and the federal republic are based on the sovereignty of individual
and collective groups of citizens; but it is only the federation that, in accordance with purely democratic
principles, possesses the power of legislation on the supreme level of the state system. The supreme
parliament, its sessions and its composition are the very embodiment of universality and democracy. They
will, indeed, remain so, even in the case of a federation and even in the case of a federal republic,
whereas they will not remain so in a confederation and in an empire. These constitutional institutions,
however, are not sufficient to ensure the maintenance of the federal union or the existence of the
federal state without the guarantee of a specific law of the supreme parliament. In the case of a
federation, this supreme law is only a constitution; in the case of a federal republic, it is the federal
republic itself, as indicated above.
In the case of federations, the central and federal authority is thus, from the point

text:
The plant-based revolution is gathering pace as millions of Americans, including our farmers and those working their fields, eat less meat, more vegetables, and whole-food, non-GMO diets.

The goal: to replace meat and dairy with plants that can grow in fields and pastures.

To do that, we’ll need to get past the ideological divide: to accept that the animal agriculture model has failed and, if we want to save the planet, we’ll need to find another way to feed ourselves. There is no single, “best” crop to replace meat; the choices are vast.

It could be the best crop for your body.

The key is finding an agricultural model that works. There are few models in widespread use these days, and they can be wildly different—all are different and all have different implications for diet and environmental benefits.

Agriculture—food production—is driven by a series of competing imperatives and constraints. What works for one person can be quite bad for another. The choice of a specific model thus requires careful consideration of
prompt_prefix: The plant-based revolution is gathering p

  1. A first probation violation occurred; the length of such period shall be not less than fourteen days nor more than two weeks.
  2. A second probation violation occurred after a first probation violation; the length of such period shall be two weeks plus an additional two weeks for each subsequent probation violation up to a period of six months.
  3. After a period of six months has elapsed, no one probation violation may remain unpunished by expiration of the period for a period in excess of thirty days.

There’s a lot of vague, fluffy, abstract definitions at play here and you have to spend time just making sense of them, but once you do, the ideas just fall into place and you can start playing with them. It’s amazing how much you can start learning just by watching a 12 minute video on YouTube or reading a blog post that mentions them.

A lot of those ideas are based on statistics and probability. This is my first exposure into statistics, so I had to re-learn a lot of the basic concepts, so it was slow at first but once I got up to speed, these ideas came together like magic.

The thing that’s really neat about them is that these ideas just go on forever. It would be very hard to describe some ideas without also having them be applicable to other fields of science such as biology. They seem like a more fundamental underpinning to how reality works than the Newtonian laws that I learned in grade school and used in high school physics, chemistry, or environmental science courses. The court system in Sheridan, Arkansas consists of the Oneida County Court and the Oneida County Court of Appeals.

The Oneida County Court

The Oneida County Court is the trial court within the sheriff's court system within Oneida County. It has original jurisdiction in civil trials of all cases arising within the circuit of Oneida County. It also has original jurisdiction in civil actions alleging injury to or wrong in right of the county or of any court, commission or board, department or officer thereof, or the state or municipal authorities. The court also has general appellate jurisdiction in civil actions and appeals in the form of writs.

The Oneida County Court, however, does not have general appellate jurisdiction over armed robbery cases, as the Armed Robbery Prevention Act states: "No appeal of any judgment rendered in any such armed robbery case shall be allowed from such judgment to the said Circuit Court or Court of Appeals."

OTR's have been deployed in the United States, Canada, British Commonwealth, Australia, New Zealand, and other countries, including Cuba and Argentina. The OTR system combines advances in speech processing, encryption and data transmission to provide secure and robust voice communications.

Military versions include U.S. domestic and overseas productions of OTR 101 and OTR 101B/OTR 101B-1. In 1989, the National Security Agency (NSA) contracted with Lockheed Corporation to develop a secure communications system intended for military use over long distances. Sometimes when I’m out at a bar or club, I’m tempted to stay a little longer than a 4-pack of beer or 4 cocktails should last. If I’m in a noisy bar, I can often stay for hours without getting tipsy, but a group of us can get pretty drunk in a matter of hours if all is going well. I love the high, but I don’t want to be a social stalker like Homer.

So I take a page from Terry’s book, and limit myself to a 4-hour stay. If we go off track, I ask the bartender to cut us off. The waiters seem to respect this, and I often get to leave early for other activities.

Terry’s not a lawyer. However, I’m sure that he didn’t intend this advice to go completely in vain in a civilized society such as the United States. For example, while the erection lasting several hours might be unlawful in the United States, he may be on to a different thing.

The paper presents a detailed exploration of the various options proposed to generate the point cloud data based on a RGB image using the deep learning approach. Among all the considered options, the deep learning solution is deemed the most promising and the approach presented here is chosen as the reference approach for the generation of the data set.

# Contributions (Main Idea)
The main idea of the research is to train a neural network that can be used to predict the point cloud value based on a RGB image. The model is supposed to be a regression model as it will be predicting the 3D location of the object(s) within the image as compared to other research (where detection of the object itself is also included) where the model is trained to classify (detect) the object. with sister groups having diverged at least 20 million years ago (Mya)
separately. This phylogeny implies that the sister groups diverged near
or before the African Rift basin opened, with the divergence of the Eco
group in the early Eocene, while the African Sector and African Centre
had diverged after the opening of the rift. This is also supported by
the fact that the Eco group is currently the most speciose lineage (n =

Is an election recount a good idea?

For one thing, in our new model, voters and their political affiliations are fixed quantities and can be re-simulated to test different scenarios. We could simulate a recount that would result in a hypothetical vote count that differs from what actually occurred. We could simulate a hypothetical count that resulted in a different election winner. We could even simulate a recount of the final count that would result in another hypothetical final count even more in one candidate’s favor. If you’re into this kind of thing, our model code is provided at the end of the previous post, in case you want to try it for yourself.

## More models, bigger models

I think that it is fair to say that we have just scratched the surface of what’s possible in these new simulation frameworks. text:
We all know that labeling is deceptive. Labeling is a way of getting people to think of an action in terms of a particular category. These labels are not necessarily unfair – what is unfair is the tendency of powerful people to assign a category to a group of people which is used to exert influence over them.

Labels that can be used effectively can, but those that cannot are a source of disenfranchisement and disenfranchising people’s voices.

If we take for example the case of a “woman”, it is evident, that some women are in control of the men who would date or sleep with them and others are not. This is the difference between “normal” women and men and the labels we place on them should reflect the real situation and not the other way around.

Some people, as if on a hateful quest, try to avoid using such “divine” categories such as “women” or “men”. To which I would say that this is a mistake. We are only human, we all have imperfections, flaws and sins. We are not perfect.

We call these flaws and imperfections

The degree can be designed to meet a state's legal qualification requirement to become a lawyer for a particular state, and also to be the prerequisite for a bar examination in the jurisdiction.

Many universities do not grant the degree by itself; however, some have a program for only graduates of that university to use the name of the university. These programs normally require students to be admitted into the law school and must be completed within a limited period, generally two to five years.

Admission to the degree

text:
Residential buildings account for a significant amount of total building area and occupancy in this project area. Therefore it is important to account for the residential load of the building in the energy analysis. EnergyPlus requires a separate space definition for each thermal zone in order to determine this. In order to create multiple thermal zones in one EnergyPlus space, the thermal zone names within that space are separated using the “|” syntax, i.e. Space 1 = "space 1;space 1a". This allows multiple thermal zones to be placed in one space. The space definition and the associated thermal zone definitions are then given in the EnergyPlus Input Data Dictionary (IDD) file. Each thermal zone in a space definition is further divided into thermal surfaces using the “Surface:HeatTransfer:Baseboard:RadiantConvective:InnerSurf” object. The associated surface definition and the thermal zone definitions are then given in the EnergyPlus IDF file.

EnergyPlus defines a “zone” as being a thermal and moisture calculation domain and all of the thermal, moisture, and airflow objects within that definition are solved for energy and mass continuity within that zone. Energy

text:
On of the key elements for most cloud solutions and the Internet of Things is an efficient message transport.
MQTT~\cite{mqtt, oasistp} has emerged as the most suitable protocol for messaging and data transmission between devices and
a cloud. Thanks to its lightweight protocol, a simple authentication/authorization system, and wide range of client libraries, MQTT can be easily deployed on multiple platforms, including Android, web browsers, micro-controllers, and embedded systems. Apart from the security challenges on different network (wire, Wifi, Bluetooth) protocols, message authentication and authorization are major concerns for an IoT application.

The traditional security mechanisms adopted for MQTT to achieve message integrity, and confidentiality by encrypting each message over a secured channel~\cite{rfc7647}.
Some additional information, such as user credentials, are often included in the MQTT control packets such that an authentication server could  authenticate each incoming message and authorize the message for processing.
However, even though an encryption layer could provide confidentiality for the transmitted data, it is not sufficient for securing the messages in a multi-hop network because the encryption layer only protects the confidentiality of packets between clients and a broker.
This

Last summer I took a cross-country road trip across China and Mongolia. The trip was a bit rough -- a few storms here or there, and my feet and legs became very sore after the second day of walking. By the end of the trip, I had built up a great deal of pain in my knees and hamstrings.

In retrospect, I was a bit hard on myself, but in reality, this trip really did set me back. A lot. I had to spend a lot of money on treatment, because of the chronic pain I suffered for the next year or so. I knew it wasn't good for my body and I should slow down when I was training for my [marathon](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marathon), which is scheduled for January of this year.

A good franchise lead questionnaire is going to give you the kind of information about the company’s culture you need to decide whether to join up.

## How should you write the questionnaire?

You can either develop questionnaires for every position you want filled or you can use a core set of questions that you can use to help you fill all your roles.

Whatever kind of questionnaire you create, there’s a few steps you must take.

### Step 1: Decide On The Subjects To Be Asked

This is not about asking a long list of questions. What’s important is deciding on the questions that are useful for you and your team. Asking a long list of questions can add unnecessary pressure to the person answering them. It will also waste your time.

If you want to create a questionnaire for all roles, make sure you know what questions apply to all positions. Consider having a core set of questions and then specific ones to each position.

### Step 2: Prepare To Clarify Any Answers You Receive

It’s possible that people may not completely understand certain questions and give you the wrong answers.

The Riemann integral is equivalent to a simple limit process, namely, to approximate the Riemann integral of a function $f(x)$ as a sum:

$\displaystyle\int\nolimits_a^\infty{f}(x)\,dx=\int\nolimits_a^{b-h}f(x)\,dx+\int\nolimits_{b}^{b+h}f(x)\,dx+\int\nolimits_{b+h}^{b+2h}f(x)\,dx+...$

As $h$ is decreased the approximation becomes more accurate; the limit of this process is what the Riemann integral represents, and by convention, we use the same integral notation for them both.

The Lebesgue integral is more difficult, but a simple rule of thumb can bring it down to the Riemann integral. The Lebesgue integral can be defined on a function like $1/x^2$, so long as the function is measurable,

1. Run `npm install -g ember-cli`

\ac{RBC} hyperchromia is the commonest morphological alteration encountered in \ac{MCTD} in the peripheral blood. 
The alterations include cytoplasmic vacuoles, \acl{GR} (grains) and 
\ac{Spherocytosis} with \ac{RBC}s of non-normal shape and dimensions. 
\ac{HbS} and Hc-globin are the blood proteins most frequently associated to this condition. \ac{HbF} is seen less commonly in \ac{CT}s than HbS. 
\par The \ac{HbS} is the result of a mutation in the \ac{B1}\textsuperscript{-}\ac{E1} locus of the globin gene in the normal hemoglobin chain.

text:
Consider using a buying agent. Estate agents charge a service fee for the work they do, as they don't make any commission but only the service charge. If they charge a service fee that's a significant percentage of the purchase price you'll be better off by using a buying agent. 

If you're prepared to pay an expensive stamp duty, as in more than about ¼% of the purchase price. If you use a solicitor who's a conveyancer they'll take into account the stamp duty costs. But if you're prepared to pay (and you might have no choice) then it is much cheaper.

If you can, consider using an intermediary who can advise you and sell for you. The solicitor can also recommend these. These are usually in-house brokers with a solicitor. They charge a small amount for their services which is much bigger a percentage of the purchase price than a service fee.

Don't let people put words into your mouth, they have no right to do so and are likely to misleading you. Make sure you know the correct figures.

Show of hands for everyone that's been confused by this point: how do I access the content of file 'test' that is in the same directory as file myScript?

I tried: `content_test = open('test').read()`, but it doesn't work.

Thank you.username_1: The code you have posted doesn't work, because the [open](http://docs.python.org/library/functions.html#open) function is *just* a wrapper for the builtin [built-in file object](http://docs.python.org/library/functions.html#open) constructor. To quote the docs:

> 
> Return a file-like object
> 
> 
> 

This means you are passing in the file string representation to the function, not the actual file object. You need to use a function or a with statement to construct that object. You can open a file and read its contents at the same time using the with statement.

```
with open('example.txt', 'r') as content_file:
    content = content_file.read()

```

The above code gets a file object from the file

Cesspool and sewer problems are dubbed "epidemic" for their pervasive prevalence and effect on urban life. In 2008 they were classified as one of the 100 most endangered ecological systems by the United States Environmental Protection Agency. In the United States, as it is in parts of northern Europe, Canada, Australia, Asia, and Africa, cesspool and sewer problems are causing ecological imbalances resulting in eutrophication, loss of biodiversity, and changes in landscape.

Some cities, such as New York, New Delhi, and Mexico City, have begun to remediate cesspool and sewer problems through the construction of wetlands. It was believed that the problem of cesspool and sewer deprivation would be resolved by the creation of "water parks" that would naturally treat the runoff. In 1972, snow storms forced the suspension of the season between April and September 1972.
The league disagreed on whether or not to award points for the games that season, and therefore no points were awarded during that time.

## Local Login Process

In order to login to the local system, user must provide username and the
matching password.

Local login process is configured using pam for controlling user
authentication, account management, session management, and the password
change.

The local login process is controlled by using pam modules in following
order.

1. pam_securetty module
2. pam_nologin module
3. pam_rhosts module
4. pam_listfile module
5. pam_rootok module
6. pam_group module
7. pam_unix module

text:
Bitcoin is a currency, used to exchange goods and services. Every transaction made on the Bitcoin
network costs a small amount of Bitcoin to the miners. Every month, every miner earns a small
amount of Bitcoin by mining a 256-bit hash, 2<sup>256</sup>. The 256-bit nonce required to create such a
hash is what miners are trying to solve in order to get paid.

![image5](img/image5.jpg)


## Why is mining so valuable?

Mining Bitcoins is valuable, because it requires lots of computational power that would otherwise not
be used. And, in the case of Bitcoin, the payout for such a difficult but incentivizing task, is
compensated with Bitcoins. This ensures that mining is only profitable if the value of the money is
high enough to justify such a task.

This is not only how miners ensure the security and availability of the Bitcoin network. It enables a
decentralized trust system in the blockchain, where users of Bitcoin do not need to trust each other to
trust the network.

Are you using regular expressions of words, with spaces as separators?  If yes, then use a regular expression with the [ \t]+ pattern to find the whitespace.  You can access the result of the regex with m.group(0).split('[ \t]').length to know the total number of words in this sentence, and use m.group(0) later to know exactly which one you are referring to.  If you prefer not to use regex, then use the whitespace as a separator in a loop.  You can also split the string by words (with [ \t]+), and look for your word index, or you can look for your sentence, and split it by words, but this is slower. # Bypassing Windows Defender in a Crowdstrike Investigative Response Workflow

## Introduction

The aim of this post is to demonstrate and describe a method for the bypassing of Defender (and other AV). We will look at how to prepare an executable so that it bypasses Defender. We will then use CrowdStrike’s Falcon Sandbox to show that bypassed Defender can be easily detected and mitigated.

All steps for this post were performed in a lab using only lab infrastructure, with the exception of the executable which needed to be made to perform a real action to be worth the effort.

The steps for this can be performed in an almost completely automated process. The process to perform can be split into four basic steps:

• Identifying the tool to be used in the by-pass:
A good starting point is to find a public tool that is already developed to easily by-pass AV.

• Identifying a file signature to target for the by-pass:
Once we identify the tool we want to use, we need to identify the exact signature

# 2015-03-02 The Battery Box

Tags: batteries battery-box

A small box made to fit a handful of batteries in. It fits on a ring in a way to keep the batteries a little away from others. The box is made either of aluminium or plastic.

## Contents

There is a choice to make whether to have the box in plastic or aluminium. An example battery box is shown in Figure 71.

## Build

To build this project, we will need:

• An aluminium plate or two sheets of plastic
• A pair of scissors
• A pair of tweezers
• A hammer (optional)
• Paper and/or cardboard
• Plastic film
• A ruler

### Plastic Case

First we will cover up the plastic, making it look like a cardboard box. This will be the size of a small cardboard box:

An excellent matrix determination suite.

MM is a library offering a variety of matrix determination algorithms.

This branch branch4 contains an updated API described in this paper: http://arxiv.org/abs/1305.6020
, and the matrix computation library (the matrix class) which implements this new API. Other branches of this repository may include a matrix determination implementation using an older and different API.

All examples can be found in the examples directory.

This library is released under the WTFPL, see the LICENCE file for more information.

## Authors

MM was written by  and  using the ECL interpreter with FCL.

## The determination library for matricies (MM.lisp)

The determination library for matricies allows the determinant of a matrix to be calculated.

It supports both square matrices, and square matrices with 1's for the diagonal.

# convertcsvtopdf


This program is using a csv file a generate to a PDF file for the 3M program. You want to add this to a listbox where people can choose to download a pdf file and get an overview of it. This is a little bit tricky and complicated.

-

It is possible that you add this to a database and add information into your listbox automatically to do so you can connect your database with the 3m program.

This pdf should be available to any employee so we can give a pdf with all the workstations we have.

### Important

The PDF is sorted in ascending order by the building first then by the floor with the amount of Racks and for the last page we can see what machines we have and the Racks.

1. Create folder to have a listbox where you can generate a PDF based on the input
2. Read csv with Python and generate a dataframe with pandas 
3. Create a PDF file with a Python library called FPDF

Download the repository and then run the following python program to make it work:

```
python Inds/inductme.py
```

To make it work through a web browser

```
python Inds/inductme.py && firefox http://127.0.0.1:5000/Inducts
```

## The Current and Current Curve on Micro Cap - Auto.

This page talks about Current and the Current curve on the software. If it shows as Current, it indicates that the component does have the Current value.

If the component does not have a current, there will be a message saying “The component does not have a current.”

## About Current

Current is the current passing through a component.

The Current in the Current-Voltage Chart shows the Current value corresponding to the voltage value selected.

Current will only show if the component has a current.

Current will not show for some components which do not have Current (For example, Transistor - Bipolar and FET Transistor).

The Current is always shown as a constant current and the current curve won’t show.

## The Current-Voltage Chart

The Current Current curve is displayed on this window. The unit is A.

In this tutorial, the Current-Voltage Chart is displayed.

This example shows the Current Current curve of the resistor named R1.

(As shown below, the Current is set as 13 A.)

## Main S-Type/V.md - How does GDSS load modules?

# Main S-Type/V.md - How does GDSS load modules?

Post: 1

## How does GDSS load modules?

GDSS loads a few modules.  It will load the following modules:

• The core library, s_main.lua
• Your custom config file,  s_config.lua
• The event handler file if it exists,  s_events.lua

These are all loaded in one file s_loader.lua.

## What is the Main library, s_main.lua responsible for?

The main library is responsible for the following:

• Loading s_config or s_loadconfig
• Loading s_v
• Managing Globally shared objects
• Event handler
• Command handler
• Core Command Handlers
• Other

## What is the Shared/Static object library/class s_v.lua?

s_v is short for s_value, it is used to store values globally but are statically shared.  (They are shared between all

> Theorem 0:
> 
> > \begin{center}
> > If a digraph `g` has a unique spanning tree, then `g` is acyclic.
> > \end{center}
> 
> Proof (Contrapositive): 
> 
> > \begin{center}
> > Suppose a directed graph `g` is cyclic.
> >
> > Suppose `r` is a spanning tree with `g`.
> > 
> > Then the cycle exists in `r`.
> >
> > Thus, `r` is not `g`'s unique spanning tree.
> > \end{center}
>
> Conclusion: This means there is no unique spanning tree for a cyclic graph.

## Headings

You can use one hash mark at the begining of a line (#), to denote a heading. (You can specify at which level the heading is by adding more # symbols, just like the format of headers in GitHub Issues.)

## Bold and Italic

You can make a word bold with the following syntax: **bold word**

Similarly, to make something italic do the following: *italic line*

You can also combine them with two asterisks and then an underscore: **_bold and italic_**

## List

You can make an unordered list with a hyphen (-) in the beginning of each item, or an asterisk (*).

# App Structure

This document describes the app structure of a React, Redux and Bootstrap application.

## Overview

The app structure has essentially three main components.
- The App component.
- The view component.
- Container components.

**The App component**

The app component, denoted as App, defines all the components that are being rendered - directly being rendered or being renderable.
You render by specifying element names (e.g. <Button>).
You also can import components from a file (e.g. import {Button} from

## GitHub

GitHub is a free web-based Git repository hosting service. It is widely used for open source projects and other organizations that want to use the Git tool to manage their projects.

To create a new repository:

1. Login
2. On the top, right click, select "New repository"
3. Fill in the name
4. Enter a description
5. Select the visibility (public/private)
6. Initialize with a gitignore (recommended)
7. Create a readme (recommended)
8. Choose a license (recommended)
9. Click "Create repository"

You will then be presented with a few basic steps for using git:

1. Go to GitHub
2. Select one of your recent repos (or go directly to the web URL)
3. Under HTTPS clone URL, select "SSH" tab
4. Copy the text in text field to your clipboard

# Markdown

A plain-text format for writing html.

Inspired by the simplicity of markdown format syntax while still providing enough structural elements to produce html output.

Markdown is not an attempt to replace html or to convert into html. Its purpose is simple. To allow people to write using the minimum amount of markup with no indented code blocks or embedded images while still producing sufficiently structured html. The Markdown format should be as fast to read and write as possible.

In theory, the Markdown format is just not too different from html as it can be transformed into html with a relatively small amount of code. But it should be as easy to read and write as possible.

## Overview

If you've used markdown before, you might be interested to know that a single backtick will turn a phrase into  a single line code sample . Two backticks will produce a single line code sample with backticks. To see how markdown handles backslashed characters, try copy and pasting these lines as is (no indentation) in your browser using the same keyboard shortcuts that you

## The KSICC '1 to N KS to find' algorithm! v.1.0

by. @eliekann on 23 Dec 2009 02:38 PM | PERMALINK | Permalink

I wrote up a KSICC '1 to N KS to find' algorithm and it is now posted here for all to use. This is a general algorithm that will apply to any N sided KS problem. It is fast and very general.

Let N be the number of sides of the KS. The problem will have N + 1 different outcomes, i.e., {0, 1, 2, …, N}. A Kickstarter to find is any non-zero value of the KS, i.e., {1,..., N}. The probability of the KS being zero is p0. The probability of ‘x’ is p(x). The probability of ‘x’ is,

$px = \frac{N-x}{N} \cdot p0$

Note that the probability of the KS being zero (p0) can not be found by the

### RSA Key Generator (in python)

##### Key-generation steps:
• Choose $$p$$ and $$q$$ as prime numbers and $$n=pq​$$.
• $$\phi(n)=(p-1)(q-1)​$$.
• Choose an integer $$1<e<\phi(n)​$$ such that $$gcd(e,\phi(n))=1$$ and publish $$n$$ and $$e​$$ as public key.
• Compute $$d≡e^{-1} (mod \phi(n))​$$ and keep $$d​$$ as private key.
• Private key = $$(p,q,e^{-1})​$$
• Public key  = $$

For the sake of simplicity, assume that values are given in terms of bits. Given
n bits, there are 2^(n)n-bit numbers. The most significant bit (MSB) of a number is
the leftmost bit. The least significant bit (LSB) of a number is the rightmost
bit. In the following example, assume that the value of 20 bits x, is 110111000.
In a number, bits are indexed from 0. So, the number of bits in x equals 20.
(x)_n=2n(x)_=
(20)20(20)
The most significant bit (MSB) of x is x[20-1]=x[19]=1. The value of
MSB is 1.
Similarly, the least significant bit (LSB) of x is x[0]= 0. The value of
LSB is 0.
In a number, digits are indexed from 0. So, the number of digits in x equals
log(x).

# The Birth of God
<font size=2> Written on May 31, 2020 by.
> This text was written to further discuss [the Birth of God debate](http://www.religionfacts.com/jesus-christ/the-birth-of-god-debate.htm) of modern times. The topic can be broken down into two main divisons: 
>1. The Catholic Church teaches that God is born of a real physical entity (the Virgin Mary), while the Protestant's believe God was born of a spiritual entity (the Holy Ghost). 
>2. The Catholic Church teaches that God is both the Father, Son, and Holy Ghost, while the Protestant teaches God is the Father, Son, and Power. 
>It is these differences which lead to the following questions:
>- If God is a spirit, how did he get physical?
>- How did God come to a physical form?

import MyPromise

 # for abc purposes
 import inspect


  ## abc.promises(arg1,.., argm)
  ## creates new promise
  ## arg1,.. argm are callbacks passed to the abc promise
  ## abc will execute these methods on different processes
  macro abcpromises(args,...) : expr =
      var callbacks = newTree(nnkBracket)
      let abcArgs = args

      for arg in args:
          if 'then' not in inspect(arg):
              callbacks.add(arg)

      quote do:
          new MyPromise(... abcArgs)
      end

macro def(name, body)
    quote do:
        def()
        def(~name)
        ~body
    end
end# abc

## Contributors

## Setup

3. Industry Data from Historical Data via the Statistical Intelligence Agency is for everyday sales for products sold under 1000 dollars. It is then averaged to determine the price index which measures the price at which a commodity trades. The data is collected in weekly intervals. However it can be averaged to determine the daily or monthly pricing index. The data is collected at regular intervals over a long period of time. The CPI or consumer price index determines the average price of a commodity. When it rises, a price rise signal is given, however a falling index determines a price fall. It is collected on a weekly basis (WPI) and monthly basis (CPI). The BLS provides the historical price data, which is averaged to form the average daily price index. This number is calculated based on the current average price of the product and how it compares to the average price in the past month. The average price is then compared to the average price sold for the current week. When this happens, a drop in the average price is indicated, while it is indicated when a rise in the average price is shown.

AVL is developed from traditional binary search tree and augmented to support insert, delete and search operations in logarithmic time. It is a self-balanced binary search tree.

AVL tree is designed not only for searching but also for inserting, deleting nodes.

An important reason of using aVL tree instead of a normal binary search tree is that it prevents from illegal rotations.

 introduced the concept in 1962 and published it in 1962. [3]

The height of every tree should differs no more than 1. Therefore the name: AVL tree(named after inventor Adelson-Velsky and Landis).

This program will use the data from 2017 game on the FRC web site and make a "live" team standing chart.

The goal is to:
- update the standing chart as the games play out so the match data for each team is available and we can rank the teams. This is useful since the OPR, DPR, and CCWM (and others) are being calculated with the match results after the games have occurred.
- this program will be the "base" program that others who want to use similar charts can use/modify

I’m going to write a lot about monoidal categories, since last month I gave this 4½-hour lecture at Caltech:

Abstract. This series of talks will introduce monoidal categories and some of their most important applications. I’ll focus on applications to topology and geometry, though they have enormous applications to disparate areas of mathematics.

The most famous application is the fact that any compact space $X$ gives a symmetric monoidal category with a single object $\otimes,$ the Cartesian product of spaces, and morphisms

$C(X^n, X )$

where $C(-,-)$ here denotes the space of continuous functions. More generally, any ‘homotopy theory’ gives a symmetric monoidal category in a similar way—that is how we define topological quantum field theories.

9] A RAYON WORM.

01]

The RAYON WORM is a very rare animal, and not known to have been discovered in this country about the year 1790; it may therefore be regarded as a newly found specimen. The naked body of this animal is of a dark grey color, with black markings on the surface, and these markings are notably broad, covering the whole surface. Between its eyes stand two white dots. It has two rows of marginal hairs, and the outer row is longer than the inner row. In the mouth is found a pair of small tusks, pointed backwards, and these tusks serve to cut any other animal which this worm might happen to meet with. This worm is not very rare, and it probably can be said to be common in many parts of the world.

November 28, 2014

Abstract: The precision of global analysis PDF fits is continuously improving. More complex, higher-order corrections to perturbative QCD as well as non-perturbative contributions are being taken into account. The uncertainty in the data itself however can only be reduced with new experimental measurements. In this proceeding, we will discuss the impact of the CMS measurements of top-quark pair differential cross sections in pp collisions at 7 TeV on PDFs, where we compare the current ATLAS, CMS and LHCb measurements for double-differential cross sections and discuss the impact of the combined measurements on PDFs.

So the workflow might be more like this.
